page.title: Vawraek Technology
page.description: The independent studio behind Quinfall — founded January 2021 with a mission to build AI-driven, massive-scale MMORPG worlds.

hero.title: Architects of Bold Journeys
hero.subtitle: Founded in January 2021, Vawraek Technology grew out of the same team that built the Turkish MMORPG Kayra Online — its beta success paved the way for Vawraek's larger ambitions. With advanced technology and AI systems, the studio strives to be one of the pioneers of its field, building revolutionary, reliable and creative ideas for a global audience.

pillars.title: The 4 Pillars of Vawraek
pillars.subtitle: Pulled from the official vawraek.com page

innovation.name: Innovation
innovation.body: Approaches the industry with fresh ideas — designs experiences that step outside the classic MMO mold.

scale.name: Massive Scale
scale.body: With its first game The Quinfall the studio aims to build the largest MMORPG universe in the world — and a Sandbox vision that brings real life into the digital one.

global.name: Global Audience
global.body: Multilingual content and a worldwide community focus from day one.

ai.name: AI Systems
ai.body: Going beyond traditional game mechanics with AI-driven systems that build a living world.

kayra.name: Kayra Online
kayra.tagline: The team's first project · Turkish MMORPG
kayra.body: A Turkey-focused MMORPG built on Unity by the same team that later founded Vawraek. The beta enjoyed strong reception in the Turkish community and helped The Quinfall secure its initial investor backing. The project was shelved before a full release.

quinfall.name: The Quinfall
quinfall.tagline: The studio's second game · Medieval MMORPG
quinfall.body: Built on the lessons of Kayra Online, this is Vawraek's first global title — a 2016 km² open world with non-target combat, sailing, caravans and massive sieges. Live now.

sandbox.name: Next-gen Sandbox MMORPG
sandbox.body: Vawraek's next big step: a Sandbox MMORPG universe at a scale that brings real life into the digital world. Details coming soon.
